title: nageia thevetiifolia
intro: Nageia thevetiifolia, also known as the Thevetia tree, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Podocarpaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nageia thevetiifolia include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and cough. Herbal preparations of Nageia thevetiifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
